stonetop.summary: A reaching, matter-passing hand-swarm that drags the precious back to Daagon's Mouth.

system.concept: A reaching, matter-passing hand-swarm that drags the precious back to Daagon's Mouth.
system.description: In a deep, deep cave, where light has never shined, there is a lake. In that lake, there is a Mouth of Daagon: ever-hungry, ever-greedy, consuming all that it is offered. And in the caverns around that lake? There you will find the Hand: ever-groping, ever-grasping, dragging all it finds of value back to the Mouth.
